title: Modernized Hostiles
description: Retextures of the classic Hostile Mobs to match the modern art style.
body:
Small Resource Pack that retextures a few of the classic mobs to attempts to fit in with modern art style. (What if they were designed today)
![Picture showing the retextured Zombie, Skeleton and Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec5b7d4a568cad9c151b0e92720b79b4b00d061.png)
Some mob Variants (Zombie Variants require Entity Texture Features or Optifine):
![Picture showing the zombie variants and Wither Skeleton retexture.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bf26d137a57fe816eb76beaae45d85898543c79.png)
